_comment: Fixture: 2026-05-07 Carlitos (Junior account). Captured live via mcp__garmin__get_sleep_data during COLOSSUS readout 2026-05-07 ~07:30 PT — only fields consumed by get_body_battery_at_wake's sleep_data_fallback path are retained (dailySleepDTO.sleepEndTimestampGMT + sleepBodyBattery[]). Sleep window 06:55→13:52 UTC = 11:55 PM PST May 6 → 6:52 AM PST May 7. Last sleepBodyBattery entry's startGMT (1778161860000 = 13:51 UTC, 60s before wake) carries value=92 — matches Garmin Connect mobile app. Note: startGMT is a NUMBER (epoch ms) on Junior accounts — adult accounts emit a string ('YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss') in the same field.
